zh.lifeSummary: 當Anastasia von Schwerin-Wittenburg於1287年出生在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 梅可倫波-史維林斯塔特 維騰波格維騰波格時，她的父親Count Niklot Hagen von Schwerin I37歲，母親Princess Miroslava von Pommern20歲。她和Gerhard IV Schleswig-Holstein-Plön至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1320年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年33歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Anastasia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of the Greek male name Anastasios (a derivative of anastasis ‘resurrection’). It has always been popular in Eastern Europe, in honour of a 4th-century saint who was martyred at Sirmium in Dalmatia. It was also used occasionally in England in the Middle Ages and as late as the 17th century; more recently it has made a considerable comeback. One of the daughters of the last tsar of Russia bore this name. She was murdered by the Bolsheviks in 1918 , along with the rest of her family, but in 1920 a woman claiming to be the Romanov princess Anastasia came to public notice in Germany, and a film was later based on this story ( 1956 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Anastasia von Schwerin-Wittenburg was born in 1287, in Wittenburg, Wittenburg, Mecklenburg-Schwerin, her father, Count Niklot Hagen von Schwerin I, was 37 and her mother, Princess Miroslava von Pommern, was 20. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Gerhard IV Schleswig-Holstein-Plön. She died in 1320, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anastasia von Schwerin-Wittenburg est née en 1287, à Wittenburg, Stadt Wittenburg, Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin, son père, Count Niklot Hagen von Schwerin I, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Princess Miroslava von Pommern, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Gerhard IV Schleswig-Holstein-Plön. Elle est décédée en 1320, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anastasia von Schwerin-Wittenburg 1287 in Wittenburg, Stadt Wittenburg, Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Count Niklot Hagen von Schwerin I 37 und ihre Mutter Princess Miroslava von Pommern 20. Sie hatte mit Gerhard IV Schleswig-Holstein-Plön mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1320 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anastasia von Schwerin-Wittenburg è nata il nel 1287 nel Wittenburg, Stadt Wittenburg, Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin, sua padre, Count Niklot Hagen von Schwerin I, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Princess Miroslava von Pommern, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Gerhard IV Schleswig-Holstein-Plön. Morì nel 1320, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 33 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Anastasia von Schwerin-Wittenburg(이)가 1287년 그로ss헤어즈그투 클렌버그-슈워인 스타드트 윗텐버그 윗텐버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Count Niklot Hagen von Schwerin I(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Princess Miroslava von Pommern(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Gerhard IV Schleswig-Holstein-Plön(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1320년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anastasia von Schwerin-Wittenburg родилась в 1287 г. в местности виттенбург, стадт виттенбург, гроssхирзогтум меккленбург-щвирин, её отцу по имени Count Niklot Hagen von Schwerin I было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Princess Miroslava von Pommern, 20. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Gerhard IV Schleswig-Holstein-Plön. Она умерла в 1320 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 33 лет.
